job_description:
# ETL Tester Healthcare Domain | Remote
Company: Keypixel Software Solutions
Source: Dice
Employment type: Contract
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/f52fd7ea-b1ce-471e-aa30-f4da31fcd184

## Highlights
- Remote ETL tester role focused on healthcare domain projects.
- Posted 4 hours ago.
- Requires ETL testing, backend/database validation, complex SQL, data warehousing, ETL mapping analysis, and test strategy/test case work.
- Very strong functional overlap with Swagatika's validation-heavy background.
strengths: Excellent match on ETL testing, SQL validation, data warehousing, and mapping analysis.
Resume already supports reusable validation test cases, source-to-target testing, and reconciliation.
gaps: Role asks for 10+ years; resume supports 7+ years.
Pure tester title may undervalue broader analyst experience, but the functional fit is strong.
notes: High-priority QA keyword hit. Tailor directly toward ETL testing, SQL validation, mapping analysis, healthcare data, and test case design. Do not overstate years of experience.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: ETL Tester | Healthcare Data QA Analyst | SQL Validation | Data Warehouse QA

replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and testing enterprise data pipelines across healthcare and other large-scale domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Strong fit for ETL testing roles that require mapping analysis, backend validation, and robust QA execution.

replacements.find: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage
replacements.replace: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage, backend data validation

replacements.find: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—adopted across the QA team to standardize testing and reduce ramp time for new analysts.
replacements.replace: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—to strengthen ETL QA execution and standardize testing.

validation_notes: official_site_checked is missing or false; official career site was not verified; detail page loaded and posting date is within 60 days
